para_trans: Government Purpose Sheet No: - Nagar- 2026 / P.No.265 / NV-33
As per the government decision regarding the water supply project of Nevasa town under the Nagrothan Mahaviyaan.
Administrative approval has been granted. Paragraph No. 3 on page 3 of the said Government Decision. 03
Read as follows "Water supply to Nevasa Nagar Panchayat as per Government Decision at No.6 in the Reference No.
The project is being accorded in-principle administrative approval subject to the following conditions "in lieu of" in-principle approval.
According to the government decision at No. 6, the water supply project of Nevasa Nagar Panchayat will have the following conditions:
Subject to administrative approval. "It should be read.
The Government Corrigendum is available on the Government of Maharashtra's www.maharashtra.gov.in website.
